+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "n8n-2527-n8n-import-with-fixed-id",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "n8n: n8n import with fixed ID",
+    "description": "n8n import with fixed ID. This issue affects 15+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify n8n troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your n8n deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review n8n configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant n8n configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl get configmap -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=n8n\n```\nWe have a PROD and a DEV context. We have a lot of different gitlab repositories which import a whole folder via gitlab ci:\n`n8n import:workflow --separate --input=./assets/processes`\n\nThis works fine in our dev, because we are creating the"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for n8n import with fixed ID",
+        "description": "Workaround for import workflows on postgre dbs\nhttps://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/2527\nhttps://github.com/typeorm/typeorm/issues/2215\n\nGithub issue / Community forum post (link here to close automatically):\n\n(Not tested yet)\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm n8n import with fixed ID is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n n8n --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Workaround for import workflows on postgre dbs\nhttps://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/2527\nhttps://github.com/typeorm/typeorm/issues/2215\n\nGithub issue / Community forum post (link here to close automatically):\n\n(Not tested yet)",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
